findings.evidence: The PR defines only `def range (f : Hom R C M N)` with carrier `LinearMap.range f.toLinearMap` at Subcomodule.lean:218, while the nearby established pattern has `def map (f : C →ₗc[R] D) (A : Subcoalgebra R C)` with carrier `A.carrier.map f.toLinearMap` at Subcoalgebra/Map.lean:64 and derives the top/range case at lines 124-126.
findings.fix: Add `Subcomodule.map (f : Comodule.Hom R C M N) (A : Subcomodule R C M) : Subcomodule R C N` with carrier `A.toSubmodule.map f.toLinearMap`, prove the membership/order API there, and derive `Hom.range` as `(⊤ : Subcomodule R C M).map f` or an equivalent wrapper.
findings.issue: `Comodule.Hom.range` is only the top-subcomodule special case of the natural image construction for subcomodules.

summary: The new subcomodule API is under-generalized: it proves only the image of the whole source comodule, while the natural Mathlib-level construction is image of an arbitrary subcomodule under a comodule morphism.
